allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "docs\\.vuepress\\components\\" | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName "docs\\.vitepress\\theme\\components\\" -Force }; Get-ChildItem "docs\\.vuepress\\public\\data\\" | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName "docs\\.vitepress\\public\\data\\" -Force }; Get-ChildItem "docs\\.vuepress\\public\\images\\" | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName "docs\\.vitepress\\public\\images\\" -Force }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "docs\\.vuepress")
